headline: Leaked T-Mobile memo reveals major customer account policy change
summary: Since last fall, T-Mobile has been led by Srini Gopalan, who officially became CEO on Nov. 1. He has repeatedly expressed his goal of making T-Mobile a digital-first company and has recently been ushering in companywide changes to achieve it. While this initiative has previously sparked ...

headline: T-Mobile Joins Rivals On Satellite Venture With Shares Below Targets
summary: T-Mobile US (NasdaqGS:TMUS) is joining AT&T and Verizon in a proposed joint venture focused on satellite based, direct to device mobile connectivity across the United States. The three carriers plan to pool network and spectrum resources to reduce mobile dead zones and support emergency communications coverage. The collaboration is intended to speed up integration of satellite services into everyday mobile usage and broaden coverage beyond traditional towers. T-Mobile US, listed as...
